name: from a ctp.config.yaml repo, an OWASP/universal source rule (hardcoded secret) is enforced natively at BOTH write-time and audit-time
command:
mkdir -p repo && printf 'const apiKey = "AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE"
' > repo/app.js && printf 'name: c
extends: [standard]
' > repo/ctp.config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file repo/app.js 2>w.txt; wc=$?; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-audit.sh" --root repo 2>a.txt; ac=$?; [ "$wc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'rule=g-universal-no-hardcoded-secrets' w.txt && [ "$ac" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'status=red' a.txt && echo source-rule-write-and-audit 1>&2
